PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|html|scss|css|json)$'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/frontend" && npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.env|bun\.lockb|package-lock\.json)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files or .env files' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
PreToolUse.description: Block edits to lock files and .env
